ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SA2', $Profile.Name <> 'Supervisory', $Profile.Name <> 'Ops Manager -Rig', $Profile.Name <> 'Ops Manager - Transport', $Profile.Name <> 'Field Manager - Camp', $Profile.Name <> 'Field Manager - Rig', $Profile.Name <> 'Ops Manager -Rig (New)' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorized to add/edit a Site. Kindly, contact your Operations Manager for same.
